validationPlans.title: Validate existing product: FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具
validationPlans.targetProduct: FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具
validationPlans.objective: Validate whether FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具 can produce first-revenue intent before starting new product work.
validationPlans.hypothesis: If pricing, CTA, and delivery details are clear, FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具 can produce measurable purchase intent.
validationPlans.successMetric: Product page CTA clicks, leads, or presale orders.
validationPlans.minimumSuccessThreshold: CTA clicks >= 10 or leads >= 3 or presale orders >= 1 within 7 days.
codexTasks: Audit FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具 product page pricing, CTA, FAQ, and delivery copy.
Draft a pricing test checklist for FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具.
humanTasks: Confirm the FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具 validation offer and price.
Handle manual payment, lead follow-up, or customer questions.
risks: Existing product readiness does not prove paid demand.

validationPlans.title: Validate AI Prompt Kit
validationPlans.objective: Validate whether AI Prompt Kit can produce near-term purchase intent before heavy development.
validationPlans.hypothesis: If ENHE presents a clear AI Prompt Kit offer, users will click CTA, leave leads, or place at least one presale order.
validationPlans.successMetric: Landing page CTA clicks, leads, or presale orders.
validationPlans.minimumSuccessThreshold: CTA clicks >= 10 or leads >= 3 or presale orders >= 1.
codexTasks: Draft one focused AI Prompt Kit validation page with pricing, FAQ, and CTA.
Add tracking notes for CTA clicks, leads, and manual purchase intent.
Create one comparison or use-case content brief supporting AI Prompt Kit.
humanTasks: Review the AI Prompt Kit offer and decide the validation price.
Respond manually to leads or presale inquiries within 24 hours.
risks: Competitor signals do not prove traffic, sales, or revenue.

instructions: Edit the manual validation input JSON under reports/ebos/validation/inputs.
For each result, keep planId unchanged and set status to not_started, running, completed, or skipped.
Record only observed metrics: ctaClicks, leads, presaleOrders, paidOrders, revenue, refunds, replies, feedback, and notes.
Leave unknown fields empty; EBOS must not fabricate clicks, leads, orders, or revenue.
Run scripts/generate-ebos-validation-report.ts after manual results are recorded.
